notes: Boot-screen visual redesign (part 1). Added per-row line icons to the boot checklist (layers/database/share/zap/shield+/cpu/ghost), each a gradient-stroked inline SVG via a shared #biGrad def. Glowing gradient-bordered panels on the boot checklist and the topology cards, and a pitch-black #boot background. All additive/override CSS scoped under #boot; existing launch() wiring, the ENTER PHANTOM button, boot-item injection points (update/resume/clone-war rows), and topology onclick handlers are untouched. The ENTER ring / 'System Ready' top panel from the design target is intentionally NOT included in this pass (it would relocate the working enter button) — pending explicit go-ahead. Builds on v1.6.41 (Audiowide wordmark).
